title: Zig Creator Calls Spade a Spade, Anthropic Blows Smoke
summary: The article critiques Anthropic's marketing around Claude's capabilities, arguing that claims of advanced reasoning and safety are exaggerated. It contrasts this with the Zig creator's direct, no-nonsense technical criticism, suggesting the AI industry often obscures real limitations with hype. The piece is a commentary on AI discourse rather than a technical deep dive.
